opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge with web-scheduled tasks isn't just the scheduling itself, but reliably handling transient errors and retries across distributed services. Consider implementing a circuit breaker pattern—a design to stop repeatedly calling a failing service—to prevent cascading failures and maintain overall system stability. You'll also want to factor in idempotency—the ability to safely re-run a task without unintended consequences—especially with asynchronous webhooks.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents and tooling involves scheduling and orchestration, so I can offer a relevant technical perspective.
